src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: Java 21 enforces stricter serialization checks; without @Serial, the compiler may flag the field as invalid or generate warnings/errors depending on the strictness level of the build tool.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is defined in java.io.Serial; without the import, the code will fail to compile.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization best practices enforced by stricter compiler checks in Java 21.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: Java 21 (and Java 17 with strict flags) may warn or error if serialVersionUID is not annotated with @Serial, as it is a special field for serialization; without this, the code might fail compilation under strict serialization checks or produce warnings treated as errors.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the @Serial annotation.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is defined in java.io.Serial; without the import, the code will not compile.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 17+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: Java 17+ enforces that serialVersionUID fields must be annotated with @Serial or the code will fail to compile with an error about missing annotation.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the new annotation requirement.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is part of java.io package in Java 17+; without the import, the code will fail to compile with an unresolved symbol error.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: Java 21 (and Java 14+) enforces that serialVersionUID fields must be annotated with @Serial; without it, compilation fails with 'serializable class ... has no serialVersionUID' or 'serialVersionUID is not annotated with @Serial' depending on compiler settings.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Import java.io.Serial to support the @Serial annotation.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: Compilation error: cannot find symbol @Serial without the import.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Add the @Serial annotation to the serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 21 serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: Java 21 introduces stricter checks for serialization; without @Serial, the compiler may warn or error depending on configuration, and it is required for correct serialization metadata in modern Java.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Import the java.io.Serial class to support the new annotation.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is not available without importing java.io.Serial, causing a compilation error.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Add @Serial annotation to serialVersionUID field to comply with Java 14+ serialization rules.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.why_exists: Java 14+ requires serialVersionUID to be annotated with @Serial or be private; without it, compilation fails with 'serialVersionUID field must be annotated with @Serial'.
